meta.title: Owl Cyber Defense - Edge Protection for the OT
meta.description:
Scott Coleman and Dennis Lanahan of Owl Cyber Defense show how data diode technology can meet many of the US DHS recommendations and stop 583 documented cyber incidents. 

Approaches include one-way out, one-way in, and a two-way solution the uses two one-way data diodes.
